scope: All biotech/pharma IPOs 2021–2026 on NASDAQ/NYSE (US) and HKEX 18A. US listings sourced from SEC EDGAR 424B4 final prospectus filings. HKEX listings sourced from HKEXnews.hk.
selection_methodology: 182 IPOs tracked. No raise threshold — all biotech/medicine IPOs on NASDAQ, NYSE, or HKEX 18A are included. US IPO = company filed S-1 registration + 424B4 final prospectus on NASDAQ/NYSE. HKEX IPO = Chapter 18A (pre-revenue biotech) listing. Excludes SPACs (S-4 mergers), direct listings, and secondary offerings. Clinical fields (moa, phase, lead_asset) populated for curated entries; blank for others — fill in via each company's investor relations site or SEC prospectus.
notes: ipo_price = $/share at IPO. ipo_raise_usd_m = $M raised at IPO. market_cap_now_usd_m and latest_close_usd are approximate as of 2026-05-25 — the weekly GitHub Actions job (scripts/refresh_ipos.py) refreshes these via yfinance. status = factual news headlines only (no editorializing).
